scoring_notes.mega_captain: Mega captain (ismgcaptain) scores 3x base points ONLY when the 'Extra DRS Boost' chip is active that race; otherwise 2x.
scoring_notes.transfer_penalty: Each transfer beyond the allowed limit costs 10 points, already subtracted from race_points_total.
scoring_notes.limitless_chip: Limitless allows unlimited transfers for one race with no penalty; it does not change scoring multipliers.
scoring_notes.chips_attribution: Each chip is attributed to the single race it was actually used, derived from the *takengd fields (not the sticky season-level flags).
scoring_notes.late_onboard: joined_late_no_lineup=true means the team joined after that race and did not field a real scoring lineup.
scoring_notes.race_points_total: Net points that race including chip multipliers and transfer penalties, matching the F1 Fantasy modal.
scoring_notes.validation: All 80 team-races were reconciled: computed (base x multipliers - transfer penalty) equals race_points_total.
